name: Fried Rice 3
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Carrot, shredded or finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Put bacon, carrot, onion, and celery into a frying pan.
2. Saute until the onion is soft and clear. If it appears dry, add some cooking oil, 1 tablespoon at a time.
3. Add green onion and saute another 1 or 2 minutes.
4. Add remaining ingredients.
5. Saute until heated through. Check for salt. If you are not using soy sauce, you may need more salt.
